faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is a crypto trading bot?
faq.a1: A trading bot is software that analyzes crypto markets and executes buy/sell orders automatically based on proven strategies. CryptoVision bot uses 30+ technical indicators and data-driven filters.
faq.a2: Absolutely. The bot only requests trading permissions via API key. It CANNOT withdraw or transfer your funds. Your money stays in your own exchange account.
faq.a3: We currently support Bitunix, MEXC, and BingX for futures trading. More exchanges will be added based on user demand.
faq.a4: You can start with as little as $50. We recommend $100-$300 for optimal results. Risk per trade can be set from 0.5-5% of your capital.
faq.q5: What's the difference between scalping and swing bot?
faq.a5: The Scalping Bot trades on 15-minute timeframes — small but frequent profits. The Swing Bot trades on 1H & 4H — bigger profits per trade but less frequent. Dual Bot uses both to maximize opportunities.
faq.q6: Can I use it on mobile?
faq.a6: Signals are sent via Telegram accessible on any phone. Auto trading runs on our servers 24/7, so your phone can be off and the bot keeps working.
faq.a7: We accept QRIS (all Indonesian banks & e-wallets) and USDT (crypto). Monthly billing, cancel anytime.
